ProviderName: The entity that made the resources or services available to the customer.
BillingAccountId: A provider-assigned identifier for a billing account.
BillingAccountName: A provider-assigned name for a billing account.
BillingCurrency: Represents the currency used for billing.
BillingPeriodEnd: Exclusive end date of the billing period.
BillingPeriodStart: Inclusive start date of the billing period.
BilledCost: Charge that is the basis for invoicing including negotiated or discounted prices.
ListCost: Cost calculated by multiplying the usage volume by the provider’s price.
ChargeCategory: Highest-level category associated with the charge.
ChargeFrequency: How often the charge occurs (hourly/daily/monthly etc.).
ChargePeriodEnd: Exclusive end date for which the charge applies.
ChargePeriodStart: Inclusive start date for which the charge applies.
ServiceName: Display name for the offering or service consumed.
ConsumedQuantity: The volume of a given resource or service used.
ConsumedUnit: Unit of measure for the consumed volume.
RegionName: Geographical region where the resource was consumed.
ResourceId: Unique identifier assigned to the resource.
SkuId: Identifier for the SKU associated with the service.
Tags: Key-value metadata associated with the resource.
UsageType: The type or category of usage.
ProductFamily: Product or service family under which the resource is grouped.
